title: Plushiez
description: cute plushies to craft and collect!
body:
# Plushiez

"When you need a small friend for your big adventures!"

this mod adds 20 new plushies to the game as of 2.0.3!

current plushies:![All current Plushies!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/045d4e4ea29251069669358a940aeaf6b930c5ea.png)
And ofcourse the base plushie, wich you will use to craft all the others!

### Quick tip for looks:
all plushies are wearable on your head like a helmet! They wont protect like a helmet tho... wich makes sense...


## FAQ
Q: Can i use this in my modpack?\
A: Yes go ahead!


Q: Will you update/downgrade it to version [Not supported version]?\
A: If i feel like it i might update/downgrade but i wont promise anything.

Q: Where can i suggest a plushie?\
A: In the discord that is in the making!

## More plushies comming soon!
**(use recipe search mods for the recipes)**
